{"code":"(def open-prs (github_pull_requests {:state "open"}))
(def total-count (count open-prs))
(def repo-counts (frequencies (map :repo open-prs)))
(def max-repo (apply max-key val repo-counts))

[str "(a) Total open PRs: " total-count]
[str "(b) Repository with most: " (key max-repo) " with " (val max-repo) " PRs"]
"}
